title: History modal component with diff view and relative time formatting
purpose: Displays a modal overlay showing the difference between historical and current content with relative timestamp formatting and keyboard/backdrop close functionality.
module_context: Exports a HistoryModal React component that accepts props for content, timestamp, and document name, along with an onClose handler. Includes a helper function for formatting relative timestamps.

steps.content: Parse the input ISO timestamp into a date object.
Calculate the time difference between now and the input date in milliseconds.
Convert the time difference to seconds, minutes, hours, and days.
IF the difference is less than a minute, return 'just now'.
ELSE IF the difference is less than an hour, return the minutes ago.
ELSE IF the difference is less than a day, return the hours ago.
ELSE IF the difference is exactly one day, return 'Yesterday'.
Generate a unique identifier for the component.
Set up a keyboard event listener for the Escape key to close the modal.
Prevent body scroll when the modal is open.
Clean up the keyboard event listener and restore body scroll on unmount.
IF the modal is not open, return null.
Define a handler for backdrop clicks to close the modal.
Render the modal overlay with backdrop and content.
Display the document name and relative timestamp in the header.
